news.t: ETF Architect Announces Change to the Strive U.S. Energy ETF (NYSE: DRLL)
Nine Strive funds will move primary listing from NYSE Arca, Inc. and NASDAQ Stock Market LLC to New York Stock Exchange
A Closer Look At The Investment Thesis Underlying Vivek Ramaswamy's New ETF Named DRLL
Strive Launches U.S. Energy Index Fund (DRLL) to Deliver a New Shareholder Mandate to U.S. Energy Companies

holdings.infoBox: DRLL is an equity ETF with a total of 35 individual holdings. The top holdings are Chevron stock at 22.92%, Exxon Mobil at 22.14%, Marathon Petroleum at 4.76%, Valero Energy at 4.75%, and Phillips 66 at 4.68%.

overview.description: The Strive U.S. Energy ETF (DRLL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg US Energy Select TR index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of US-listed stocks in the energy sector. The fund aims to influence companies to prioritize returns through shareholder engagement and proxy voting, without regard to ESG agendas. DRLL was launched on Aug 9, 2022 and is issued by Alpha Architect.

data.title: ETF Architect Announces Change to the Strive U.S. Energy ETF (NYSE: DRLL)
data.text: HAVERTOWN, Pa. , March 26, 2024 /PRNewswire/ -- (ETF Architect) - Effective on or about Thursday, April 11, 2024, the Strive U.S. Energy ETF (the "Fund") will undergo a change to its benchmark.

data.title: How to thoughtfully incorporate ESG data into an investment strategy
data.text: Vivek Ramaswamy, Strive Asset Management, and Arne Noack, DWS Group, join 'Halftime' to discuss ESG protocols, energy funds, and criticisms against ESG from both the left and right.
